steps.title: Read the three points
steps.content: The graph shows the points $(4,8)$, $(7,11)$, and $(7,5)$. The center of the circle must be the same distance from all three points.

steps.title: Find the center and radius
steps.content: The midpoint of $(7,11)$ and $(7,5)$ is $(7,8)$. That point is also $3$ units from $(4,8)$, so $(7,8)$ is the center and the radius is $3$.

steps.title: Use circumference
steps.content:
The circumference of a circle is
$$C=2\pi r$$
With $r=3$,
$$C=2\pi(3)=6\pi$$
Since the circumference is $k\pi$, $k=6$. The answer is B.
